cells.data:
### Core

* Object loader to dump JOSN into a template then that could be looked for via fetchAPI
* Add text to edit mode to describe what type of page that stack should be added to

### Schema

* Validating the schema for smart properties: image, color
* Add default value, so new fields can generate a default value on existing objects
* Add tooltips and labels to schema so that admin areas could be auto-generated in the future.

### Misc

* Prevent multiple fetch - https://stackoverflow.com/questions/47354369/how-to-prevent-fetch-with-same-url-being-called-twice-in-node-js
* 
* Middleware for Passport authentication
* API Error when collection does not exist: [Error] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500 (Internal Server Error) (summary, line 0) https://thefuture.weavers.space/rw_common/plugins/stacks/dynamics/api.php/collections/myobjects/summary
* Error/404 image for when ImageWorks API fails
* JS license checker to warn if license is not defined. Or number of days left in trial.
* Add the following to JS logic to inject the embedly script onto the page for Hipwig embedly support
    %[if %("%id=contents[0]%" != "")%]%
    <script src="//cdn.embedly.com/widgets/platform.js" async></script>
    %[endif]%
* All cms.joeworkman.net -> total-cms.com
* Image (and all others) errors to tooltip.js - https://popper.js.org/tooltip-examples.html
* CSV import via URL (update via Google Spreadsheet)
* CSV Import overwrites data
* prevent navigation if unsaved changes: https://stackoverflow.com/questions/821011/prevent-a-webpage-from-navigating-away-using-javascript
* Enable Dates for datepicker. Not just disable dates
* Dynamic Post/Object display stack. Use JS to randomly choose a post and display its contents. Query the collection with JSQL, then pull the first one. Or build querying into PHP API again :-(

* For text elements maybe store the original text as well as markdown converted text
* Total CMS 2 Child stacks for Video Wall?
